title: DP actor fused logprob plus entropy path
summary: Integrate the fused logprob_entropy Triton helper into the DP actor path behind an auto|torch|triton switch, with benchmark and parity coverage for padded and remove-padding flows.
success_gate: Match separate logprob and entropy outputs and beat the combined baseline on representative DP actor shapes before integrating into the actor path.

results.integration: DP actor now uses compute_logprob_and_entropy when entropy is requested, fused kernels are disabled, and entropy checkpointing is off; auto delegates to Triton on CUDA and torch elsewhere.

notes: Fixed the fused helper's torch reference sign error and generalized the helper to actor-style 2D logits as well as standard 3D inputs.

Validated with python -m unittest tests.test_logprob_entropy_kernel -v and python -m py_compile verl/workers/actor/dp_actor.py scripts/benchmark_logprob_entropy.py verl/utils/kernel/logprob_entropy.py.
